name: Technical Writer Pack
description: Workflows for coding agents producing engineering documentation: clear technical writing, architecture decision records, codebase archaeology and onboarding guides, and source-grounded, accurate references.
useCases: Create source-grounded docs for APIs, systems, workflows, and onboarding.
Turn codebase archaeology into concise architecture notes, diagrams, and ADRs.
Review technical docs for accuracy, audience fit, completeness, and maintenance risk.
Prepare agent-friendly prompts, runbooks, and references for Codex and Claude Code users.
examplePrompts: Write source-grounded documentation for this feature, including behavior, configuration, and examples.
Create an ADR for this design decision with context, options, tradeoffs, and consequences.
Review these docs for technical accuracy, missing prerequisites, unclear steps, and stale claims.
Turn this codebase area into an onboarding guide with key files, flows, commands, and gotchas.
